description_long: This object consists of five pairs of athletic shoes arranged in a row, each featuring a modern, sporty design. The shoes display a mix of deep red, blue, and light blue colorways, with each pair having a white, thick, cushioned sole typical of running or casual sneakers. The uppers appear to be made of a breathable mesh or knit fabric, with synthetic overlays for structure and support. Some shoes have visible Velcro straps, while others use traditional laces, indicating a mix of closure styles. The shoes are clean, with no visible signs of wear, and the soles are not fully visible but appear to be designed for urban walking or running. The overall appearance suggests these are new, comfortable, and practical shoes suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A set of five new athletic shoes in red, blue, and light blue, featuring both Velcro and lace closures with thick white soles. The shoes are clean, modern, and designed for comfort and urban activity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toe boxes, closure systems, and color variations of all five shoes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile, sole thickness, and closure details of each shoe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel counters and back design of the shoes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the outer profiles and color distribution.
attribute_lacing_style: mixed (standard criss-cross laces and Velcro straps)
